# String Inequality

String inequality comparison

```perl
$not_equal = $left ne $right;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$not_equal = $left ne $right;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$not_equal = $left ne $right;
```
